title: The Battle Officially Begins
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Zoro, Hody Jones, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is the battle officially begins.
scene: The scene follows the battle officially begins, keeping the focus on Zoro, Hody Jones, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That wound captain hordy received from the pirate swordsman has been hurting him real bad all day...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: ...so he's been consuming tons of energy steroids to make up for it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then he... I mean, we tried to stop him...!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nuhh!!! He is suffering from side effects of the steroids?! Oh, Captain Hody!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That drug was dangerous after all !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something's really weird about this bear... all of these sea monsters...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were brought under control by Captain Hardy himself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .......I don't think I've ever seen them look so terrified....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No just stretch it out normally !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Q: EHHHH!! (SWEAT) Stop!! Owwww!! Please wait I'm innocent -- It wasn't me -- It's the readers that are dirty--!!

summary: The Battle Officially Begins. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
